title: How AI Agents Run SEO While You Sleep
body_markdown:
## Why AI changes SEO reporting

Most teams still pull rankings into spreadsheets by hand. AI agents can do the full loop: crawl, diagnose, fix, publish, report.

### What an agent actually does

- Crawls your site weekly and flags regressions
- Drafts and publishes content mapped to target pages
- Builds internal links automatically

### The bottom line

SEO is becoming an always-on system, not a monthly checklist. Teams that adopt agents early compound traffic while competitors wait on agencies.
body_html:
Why AI changes SEO reporting

Most teams still pull rankings into spreadsheets by hand. AI agents can do the full loop: crawl, diagnose, fix, publish, report.

What an agent actually does

  • Crawls your site weekly and flags regressions
  • Drafts and publishes content mapped to target pages
  • Builds internal links automatically

The bottom line

SEO is becoming an always-on system, not a monthly checklist. Teams that adopt agents early compound traffic while competitors wait on agencies.
